title: Five-PR migration PR1: least-privilege identity + production/canary environment protection

sha_binding.verified_source_note: Filled in at commit time by ops:proof-generate --merge-sha during post-merge lane-close reconciliation.

verifier.note: PR1 of the five-PR migration authorized by UTV2-1574's ratification. Per the convergence proposal, every five-PR-migration PR is T1-H regardless of content and merges under the existing Griff-only gate.

r_level.command: pnpm exec tsx scripts/ci/r-level-check.ts --base origin/main --head HEAD

environment_protection_verification.detail: production and canary both show a required_reviewers protection rule naming griff843, applied 2026-07-22

runtime_proof.note: Environment protection is a live GitHub platform setting (not a git diff) -- verified directly against the GitHub API rather than through a code test. No other runtime-observable behavior in this diff.

scope.platform_config_change_detail: production/canary environment protection rules (required_reviewers: griff843) applied via direct API call, documented retroactively in this PR -- see 'process note' in FIVE_PR_MIGRATION_PR1_EVIDENCE.md §1 for the sequencing gap this represents.

known_gaps: GitHub App registration for both unit-talk-executor and unit-talk-reviewer requires an interactive browser flow that cannot be completed by the orchestrator -- this PR provides the ready-to-use manifest spec, not the applied Apps themselves.
The attempted-access test (executor token cannot read deploy secrets) cannot run until the executor App exists and is installed.
The environment-protection change itself was applied before this PR existed to review it -- documented as a process gap, not reverted, since the setting is correct and Griff-reversible.
